About: It is about an American heavy metal band from Southern California.
Affects: It affects relationships with As I Lay Dying.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with As I Lay Dying.
It is associated with Oh, Sleeper.
It is associated with Black Label Society.
It is associated with In Flames.
It is associated with All That Remains.
It is associated with Poison Headache.
ConsistsOf: It consists of 11 tracks condensed from several months of demos.
CreatedBy: It was created by the remaining members of As I Lay Dying.
CreatedIn: It was created in Southern California.
FoundedBy: It was founded by the remaining members of As I Lay Dying.
HasA: It has a self-titled debut album.
It has a second studio album titled Honor Is Dead.
It has a debut single titled "All Rise".
It has a second single titled "The Mason".
It has a third single titled "Death to Rights".
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by alternative metal.
It is characterized by melodic metalcore.
It is characterized by hard rock.
It is characterized by modern heavy metal.
HeldIn: It was held in the United States.
It was held in the UK.
HeldOn: It was held from July 17, 2014, to August 4, 2014.
It was held from September 27, 2014, to November 8, 2014.
It was held from January 10, 2015, to February 14, 2015.
It was held from February 20, 2015, to March 18, 2015.
It was held from May 12, 2015, to May 25, 2015.
IsA: It is an American heavy metal band.
It is a band from Southern California.
LocatedIn: It is located in Southern California.
MemberOf: It is a member of Southern California.
PartOf: It is part of the American heavy metal music scene.
ProducedBy: It was produced by Bill Stevenson.
PublishedAs: It was published as a self-titled debut album.
It was published as Honor Is Dead.
It was published as "Death to Rights".
PublishedBy: It was published by Metal Blade Records.
UsedIn: It is used in alternative metal.
It is used in melodic metalcore.
It is used in hard rock.
It is used in modern heavy metal.
